meanings.en: 深入調查、仔細探查
meanings.zh: to investigate thoroughly
examples: The PM probed deeper into why users were dropping off.

meanings.en: 調查；探針
meanings.zh: an investigation
examples: The audit was a probe into the team's decision-making process.

similar.diff: 更正式；probe 強調深入細節
examine 較全面；probe 強調主動追問

lookalikes.zh: 調查 vs 證明
lookalikes.tip: probe = 探查過程；prove = 得出結論

meanings.en: 細微的差異或差別（語氣、意義、情境上的）
meanings.zh: a very slight difference in meaning, feeling, or tone
examples: A good PM understands the nuance between user needs and user wants.

similar.diff: 更強調隱藏或不明顯
distinction 較明顯；nuance 更微妙

lookalikes.zh: 細微差異 vs 立場
lookalikes.tip: stance = 立場或姿勢，字尾相同但意思不同

meanings.en: 強烈的吸引力或著迷感
meanings.zh: the state of being intensely attracted or interested
examples: There's a fascination with data that drives our analytics culture.

similar.diff: 更強烈，常帶負面意味

lookalikes.zh: 著迷 vs 法西斯主義
lookalikes.tip: 字首相同但完全不同：fascism 是政治意識形態

meanings.en: （讓某人）加入或報名（課程、計劃）
meanings.zh: to officially register or join a program
examples: We enrolled 500 beta users in our early access program.

similar.diff: 更廣泛
更非正式

lookalikes.zh: 美式 vs 英式拼法
lookalikes.tip: 美式雙 l；英式單 l

meanings.en: 逐漸消耗、削弱（精力、信心、資源）
meanings.zh: to gradually weaken or drain
examples: Endless meetings sap the team's energy.

meanings.en: 樹液；（俚語）傻瓜
meanings.zh: the liquid in plants
examples: The maple tree produces sap in spring.

similar.diff: drain 更強調把東西抽走；sap 強調緩慢削弱

lookalikes.zh: 消耗 vs 快速攻擊
lookalikes.tip: zap = 快速擊中，語感更有力

meanings.en: 對某事同時持有正反兩面感受，無法決定
meanings.zh: having mixed or contradictory feelings
examples: I'm ambivalent about launching this feature.

similar.diff: 更口語
強調無法決定

lookalikes.zh: 情感矛盾 vs 意思模糊
lookalikes.tip: ambiguous = 含義不清；ambivalent = 情感左右為難

meanings.en: 某事物的最典型代表或縮影
meanings.zh: a perfect example or embodiment
examples: She is the epitome of a data-driven PM.

similar.diff: 更正式、文學性強

lookalikes.zh: 典型 vs 集、插曲
lookalikes.tip: 都是 epi- 開頭，但完全不同

meanings.en: 極度混亂、無秩序的
meanings.zh: in a state of complete confusion or disorder
examples: The sprint planning was chaotic — no one agreed on priorities.

similar.diff: 更常形容局勢
程度較輕

lookalikes.zh: 混亂的 vs 異國風情的
lookalikes.tip: 字尾相同 -otic，但意思完全不同

meanings.en: 比喻、隱喻（直接說某事「是」另一件事）
meanings.zh: a figure of speech where one thing is described as another
examples: 'This product is a leaky bucket' is a metaphor for high churn.

similar.zh: 明喻（用 like 或 as）
similar.diff: simile 說「像」；metaphor 說「是」

lookalikes.zh: 比喻 vs 形而上學
lookalikes.tip: 同樣 meta- 開頭，但完全不同領域

meanings.en: 荒野、未開發的自然地區
meanings.zh: a large natural area with no human habitation
examples: The team retreated to the wilderness for an offsite.

meanings.en: （比喻）政治失勢期；迷茫期
meanings.zh: a period of being out of favor
examples: After the failed launch, the product team spent months in the wilderness.

collocations.zh: 在荒野中；處於失勢狀態

similar.diff: wild 是形容詞；wilderness 是名詞

lookalikes.zh: 荒野 vs 野性
lookalikes.tip: wildness 是 wild 的名詞形式；wilderness 特指無人荒野

meanings.en: （有目的的）探險、遠征行動
meanings.zh: a journey made for a specific purpose
examples: The team treated the product discovery as an expedition.

similar.diff: journey 更廣泛
更強調目標導向

lookalikes.zh: 探險 vs 加速處理
lookalikes.tip: expedite = 加快進程；同字根

meanings.en: 禮貌的行為或態度
meanings.zh: the quality of being respectful and considerate
examples: Sometimes excessive politeness prevents honest feedback.

similar.diff: 更正式
manners 指具體行為

lookalikes.zh: 禮貌 vs 政治
lookalikes.tip: 都源自希臘文 polis（城邦）

meanings.en: （疾病的）症狀、徵兆
meanings.zh: a sign of illness felt by the patient
examples: Common symptoms of burnout include fatigue.

meanings.en: （比喻）某問題的徵兆
meanings.zh: a sign that a larger problem exists
examples: High churn is a symptom of a deeper product-market fit issue.

similar.diff: sign 是醫生觀察的；symptom 是病人感受到的

lookalikes.zh: 症狀 vs 症候群
lookalikes.tip: syndrome = 一組 symptoms 同時出現

meanings.en: 課程綱要、全部課程內容
meanings.zh: the subjects included in a course of study
examples: The curriculum was redesigned to include more hands-on projects.

similar.diff: syllabus 是單一課程；curriculum 是整個學程

lookalikes.zh: 單數 vs 複數（拉丁文）
lookalikes.tip: 正式複數是 curricula

meanings.en: 已具備所需工具、技能或資源的
meanings.zh: having the necessary tools, skills, or resources
examples: Are you equipped to handle this level of ambiguity?

similar.diff: prepared 強調心理準備；equipped 強調工具和能力

lookalikes.zh: 過去式 vs 原形
lookalikes.tip: equip → equipped，雙 p 是常見拼字陷阱

meanings.en: 物理上的摩擦力；（比喻）阻力、衝突
meanings.zh: resistance; conflict or tension
examples: There's too much friction in the checkout flow.

collocations.zh: 用戶體驗阻力（UX 術語）

lookalikes.zh: 摩擦阻力 vs 牽引力
lookalikes.tip: traction = 獲得動力；friction = 阻礙進展，意思相反

meanings.en: 划船（row 的動名詞）
meanings.zh: the activity of propelling a boat with oars
examples: She took up rowing as a form of cross-training.

similar.diff: rowing 用雙槳；paddling 用單槳

lookalikes.zh: 划船 vs 漫遊
lookalikes.tip: roam = 漫遊；兩者發音和長相都有點像

meanings.en: 颶風（大西洋地區的熱帶氣旋）
meanings.zh: a tropical storm with very strong winds
examples: The project hit us like a hurricane.

lookalikes.zh: 颶風 vs 颱風
lookalikes.tip: 都是熱帶氣旋，只是地區不同叫法

meanings.en: 在⋯⋯之外、超越
meanings.zh: further than; more than
examples: Our goals go beyond just hitting KPIs.

meanings.en: move beyond = 超越過去、向前走
meanings.zh: to progress past something
examples: We need to move beyond our reliance on manual processes.

similar.diff: 更正式、帶有哲學意涵

lookalikes.zh: 超越 vs 在⋯⋯之下
lookalikes.tip: beneath = 在下方；beyond = 超越

meanings.en: 大拇指
meanings.zh: the short thick finger
examples: He gave a thumbs up after the demo.

meanings.en: 用拇指翻閱
meanings.zh: to flip through pages
examples: She thumbed through the research report.

similar.diff: scroll 是數位時代的 thumb through

lookalikes.zh: 大拇指 vs 重擊
lookalikes.tip: thump = 用力打；多一個 p，意思差很多

meanings.en: 被放大的、增強的
meanings.zh: made larger, louder, or stronger
examples: The problem was amplified by poor communication.

similar.diff: magnify 偏視覺放大；amplify 偏聲音或影響力

lookalikes.zh: 形容詞 vs 名詞
lookalikes.tip: amplifier 是做放大這件事的裝置

meanings.en: （海浪）波濤起伏的；（比喻）不流暢的
meanings.zh: having small waves; lacking smooth flow
examples: The user journey is too choppy.

collocations.zh: 波濤洶湧（比喻困難時期）

similar.diff: turbulent 更嚴重

lookalikes.zh: 形容詞 vs 動詞：砍切
lookalikes.tip: chop = 砍切；choppy = 被砍切後的效果

meanings.en: 浮潛用的呼吸管
meanings.zh: a breathing tube used for swimming near the surface
examples: She packed her snorkel for the Hawaii trip.

similar.diff: snorkel 在水面；scuba 可潛入深水

lookalikes.zh: 浮潛 vs 打鼾
lookalikes.tip: snore = 打鼾；字形相近

meanings.en: 水肺潛水（Self-Contained Underwater Breathing Apparatus）
meanings.zh: diving using a self-contained underwater breathing apparatus
examples: He got his scuba certification last summer.

lookalikes.zh: 水肺潛水 vs 森巴舞
lookalikes.tip: 只差中間一個字母！

meanings.en: 犯罪者、罪魁禍首；（比喻）問題的主因
meanings.zh: a person or thing responsible for a problem
examples: The real culprit behind the bug was an unhandled edge case.

similar.diff: 更正式法律用語
中性詞；culprit 帶有「應受責怪」的意涵

lookalikes.zh: 罪犯 vs 文化
lookalikes.tip: 開頭 cul- 相同，但完全不同

meanings.en: 授權、使命；任務授權
meanings.zh: an official order or authorization
examples: Our team's mandate is to improve retention by 20%.

meanings.en: 強制規定
meanings.zh: to officially require something
examples: The board mandated a full product audit.

similar.diff: 從上而下的命令；mandate 帶有授權和責任

lookalikes.zh: 名詞：授權 vs 形容詞：強制的
lookalikes.tip: mandatory = 強制的（形容詞）

meanings.en: 動物的角；（車子的）喇叭；（音樂的）號角
meanings.zh: a hard growth on an animal; a warning device; a musical instrument
examples: He honked the horn in traffic.

similar.diff: 用於緊急車輛；horn 是一般喇叭

lookalikes.zh: 角 / 喇叭 vs 玉米
lookalikes.tip: 只差一個字母！

meanings.en: （鳥或飛機）俯衝、急降
meanings.zh: to move rapidly downward
examples: The eagle swooped down to catch its prey.

meanings.en: in one fell swoop = 一舉、一次搞定
meanings.zh: all at once
examples: We fixed three bugs in one fell swoop.

similar.diff: dive 更廣泛；swoop 強調從上方急速俯衝

lookalikes.zh: 俯衝 vs 掃過
lookalikes.tip: sweep = 橫向掃過；swoop = 由上往下衝擊

meanings.en: 介入、干預（某情況或衝突）
meanings.zh: to come between parties to change what is happening
examples: The manager had to intervene when the two teams couldn't agree.

similar.diff: 以中立者身份調解

lookalikes.zh: 介入 vs 面試、採訪
lookalikes.tip: inter- = 在之間；-vene = 來；-view = 看

meanings.en: 跳躍；突然快速移動
meanings.zh: to jump far or high
examples: The startup took a leap of faith and pivoted.

meanings.en: 跳躍；重大進步
meanings.zh: a big jump; a major advance
examples: This is a leap forward in our data infrastructure.

similar.diff: jump 更口語；leap 更有力

lookalikes.zh: 跳躍 vs 一堆
lookalikes.tip: heap = 一堆；只差第一個字母

meanings.en: 囤積、大量積存
meanings.zh: to collect and store large amounts, often secretly
examples: The product team was hoarding data instead of sharing insights.

similar.diff: stockpile 更中性；hoard 暗示過度、隱密

lookalikes.zh: 囤積 vs 一大群人
lookalikes.tip: horde = 一大群人；拼法差一個字母

meanings.en: 明確地、清楚地表達（不留含糊空間）
meanings.zh: in a clear and detailed manner, leaving nothing implied
examples: The requirements weren't explicitly stated, leading to misalignment.

similar.diff: clearly 更口語；explicitly 強調沒有留下模糊空間

lookalikes.zh: 明確地 vs 隱含地
lookalikes.tip: ex- = 向外說出；im- = 向內藏著，是反義詞

meanings.en: 持續存在的、揮之不去的
meanings.zh: lasting for a long time; slow to end
examples: There's a lingering distrust between the two teams.

similar.diff: persistent 更中性；lingering 帶有慢慢消失但還未消失的感覺

lookalikes.zh: 揮之不去 vs 渴望、思念
lookalikes.tip: longing = 強烈渴望；lingering = 遲遲不散

meanings.en: 槓桿作用；影響力、優勢
meanings.zh: the power to influence a situation
examples: Data is our biggest leverage in this negotiation.

meanings.en: 善用、發揮（資源或優勢）
meanings.zh: to use something to maximum advantage
examples: We should leverage our existing user base to drive referrals.

similar.diff: utilize 更正式；leverage 帶有最大化效益的意涵

lookalikes.zh: 槓桿 vs 巨型事物
lookalikes.tip: leviathan = 龐大的組織；都以 lev- 開頭

meanings.en: 磨利（刀具）；精進、磨練（技能）
meanings.zh: to sharpen; to refine and perfect a skill
examples: She spent years honing her craft as a product designer.
We need to hone our pitch before the investor meeting.

lookalikes.zh: 磨練 vs 鎖定目標
lookalikes.tip: hone in on 是常見誤用，正確是 home in on

lookalikes.zh: 磨練 vs 語氣
lookalikes.tip: tone 可以是名詞（語氣）或動詞（緊實）

meanings.en: 依賴、依靠；信任
meanings.zh: the state of depending on or trusting something
examples: Our team's reliance on manual processes is slowing us down.
Self-reliance is a key trait for senior PMs.

similar.diff: 語氣更強，常帶負面含意
trust 更偏情感信任

lookalikes.zh: 依賴 vs 聯盟
lookalikes.tip: alliance 是兩方合作；reliance 是依靠

lookalikes.zh: 可靠的 vs 依賴的
lookalikes.tip: reliable = 值得信賴；reliant = 依賴某物的

meanings.en: 保證、擔保；讓人放心的話
meanings.zh: a confident statement that something is true or will happen
examples: The PM gave the team assurance that the deadline would not change.

similar.diff: 更正式具法律效力
promise 是個人承諾；assurance 更強調消除疑慮

lookalikes.zh: 保證 vs 保險
lookalikes.tip: insurance 是商業保險；assurance 在英式英語中指人壽保險

lookalikes.zh: 使放心 vs 確保
lookalikes.tip: assure = 讓人放心；ensure = 確保某事發生

meanings.en: repetitions 縮寫：（運動的）次數
meanings.zh: short for repetitions
examples: Do 3 sets of 10 reps.

meanings.en: representatives 縮寫：業務代表
meanings.zh: short for representatives
examples: Our sales reps are hitting their quarterly targets.

lookalikes.zh: 次數 vs 說唱
lookalikes.tip: rap = 說唱或輕敲

lookalikes.zh: 代表 vs 名聲
lookalikes.tip: rep 也可以是 reputation 的縮寫

meanings.en: 自滿的、得過且過的；因滿足現狀而失去警惕
meanings.zh: smug and uncritically satisfied; unaware of potential risks
examples: After a successful launch, the team became complacent and stopped iterating.

similar.diff: 更強烈，暗示讓人反感的自大
content 是正面的；complacent 帶有危險的鬆懈意味

lookalikes.zh: 自滿的 vs 順從的
lookalikes.tip: complaisant = 願意取悅他人，差一個字母但意思天差地別！

lookalikes.zh: 自滿 vs 遵從
lookalikes.tip: compliance 是遵守規則；complacency 是自滿放鬆

meanings.en: 少得可憐的、貧乏的；數量不足的
meanings.zh: lacking in quantity or quality; insufficient
examples: The startup launched with a meager budget of $5,000.

lookalikes.zh: 貧乏的 vs 熱切的
lookalikes.tip: 都是 -ager 結尾，但意思完全不同！

lookalikes.zh: 美式 vs 英式拼法
lookalikes.tip: 同一個字

title: outside-in
hint: 由外而內（從顧客角度出發）

meanings.en: 由外而內的；從顧客或市場角度出發
meanings.zh: starting from the customer or market perspective
examples: We need to adopt an outside-in approach.

lookalikes.zh: 由外而內 vs 由內而外
lookalikes.tip: inside-out = 從公司內部能力出發；兩者是相反策略思維

meanings.en: 想像、設想（未來的狀態或可能性）
meanings.zh: to imagine or picture something in the future
examples: I envision a product that makes onboarding effortless.

similar.diff: 更口語
foresee 強調預測；envision 強調主動描繪理想狀態

lookalikes.zh: 兩者幾乎同義
lookalikes.tip: envisage 英式；envision 美式

lookalikes.zh: 動詞 vs 名詞
lookalikes.tip: vision 是名詞；envision 是動詞

meanings.en: 動作、移動；（會議中的）提案、動議
meanings.zh: movement; or a formal proposal in a meeting
examples: The team seconded the motion to postpone the release.

meanings.en: 用手勢示意
meanings.zh: to signal or gesture
examples: She motioned for everyone to sit down.

meanings.en: set something in motion = 啟動某件事
meanings.zh: to start a process
examples: The CEO's announcement set a major reorganization in motion.

lookalikes.zh: 動作 vs 情緒
lookalikes.tip: emotion 字根是「往外動的東西」

lookalikes.zh: 移動 vs 想法
lookalikes.tip: notion = 模糊的想法；只差一個字母

meanings.en: 現象級的、非凡的、驚人的
meanings.zh: remarkably exceptional; extraordinary
examples: The product achieved phenomenal growth in its first quarter.

lookalikes.zh: 形容詞 vs 名詞
lookalikes.tip: phenomenon 複數是 phenomena，不加 s！

title: perpetuate
hint: 使永久持續（常指負面事物）

meanings.en: 使⋯⋯永久持續、使⋯⋯長期存在
meanings.zh: to make something continue indefinitely
examples: Poor design decisions can perpetuate bad user habits.

similar.diff: sustain 偏中性；perpetuate 常帶有負面含意

lookalikes.zh: 使永久存在 vs 犯（罪）
lookalikes.tip: perpetrate = 犯下罪行，意思天差地別！

meanings.en: 脆弱性、易受傷害的狀態；（資安）漏洞
meanings.zh: the quality of being exposed to harm; a weakness that can be exploited
examples: The team identified a critical security vulnerability in the authentication flow.

similar.diff: fragility 強調易碎；vulnerability 強調易被傷害

lookalikes.zh: 脆弱性 vs 耐久性
lookalikes.tip: durable = 耐用；vulnerable = 脆弱，是反義概念

lookalikes.zh: 脆弱的 vs 話很多的
lookalikes.tip: voluble = 滔滔不絕的，拼法相近但意思完全不同！
